SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?opponent ?opponentLabel WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P162 wd:Q1583458 ; wdt:P585 ?date ;(wdt:P268 | wdt:P269) wd:Q1712959 ;(wdt:P268 | wdt:P269) ?opponent .
  FILTER(?opponent != wd:Q1712959)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?opponent rdfs:label ?opponentLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?opponentLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
```
